nasb.text: For I delight in loyalty rather than sacrifice, And in the knowledge of God rather than burnt offerings.

esv.text: For I desire steadfast love and not sacrifice, the knowledge of God rather than burnt offerings.

cnv.text: 我喜愛憐恤，不喜愛祭祀； 我喜愛人認識　神的知識，勝過人獻的燔祭。

ccb.text: 我喜爱怜悯之心，而非祭物； 我喜爱人认识我，胜于燔祭。
